metadata.description: The subject is a female presenting individual in their 30s with fair skin, showing minimal texture. Her face is oval with a defined jawline. She has long, straight, blonde hair with darker roots, parted on the left side, falling over her shoulders. Her eyes are almond-shaped and hazel, set moderately apart. Her eyebrows are medium thickness and arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Her lips are medium thickness with a well-defined cupid's bow. She has a few faint freckles across her nose and cheeks. Her expression is neutral, and her head is angled slightly to the left.
